_meta.title: Century-scale macro regime matrix 1900-2026 (7 phases, US/EU/Asia x large/small cap)
_meta.source: grok2.md lines ~280-530 (principal-provided 'Ground Truth' ML training matrix)
caveats: Grade-D historical synthesis (LLM-generated), designated by the principal as ML ground truth / regime reference.
Many names are delisted, private, asset classes, or non-US (illustrative regime exemplars, NOT tradeable tickers). Never leak into outputs/picks-*.
Used for regime CHARACTER + the derived guardrails, not as a tradeable universe.
The durable value is the regime taxonomy + the hard rules in regime_filter.py, not the symbols.

phases.label: industrial_steel_hegemony_ww1_roaring20s
phases.macro: Globalization 1.0, gold standard, 2nd industrial revolution, WWI, credit-fueled exuberance
phases.lesson: Small-cap melt-ups (1910 rubber, 1920s radio) end in liquidity-lock right-to-zero.

phases.label: great_depression_goldstandard_collapse_ww2
phases.macro: 1929 crash, tariff protectionism, Keynesianism, total war
phases.lesson: Liquidity shock -> gold + sovereign defense win; leveraged/financials go to zero.

phases.label: bretton_woods_coldwar_nifty_fifty
phases.macro: USD-gold peg, baby boom, Marshall Plan, space race
phases.lesson: Tronics boom/bust: themed '-onics/Space' small caps round-trip; 1949 China = sovereign zero.

phases.label: stagflation_oil_crises_volcker
phases.macro: Bretton Woods collapse, twin oil crises, great stagflation, Volcker violent hikes
phases.lesson: Stagflation -> energy is the only inflation hedge; prior-era darlings de-rate -70%.

phases.label: pc_revolution_great_moderation_dotcom
phases.macro: Inflation tamed, globalization 2.0, component standardization, internet ignition
phases.lesson: Paradigm breakthrough (PC/Netscape) -> leaders melt up; no-profit small caps round-trip to zero.

phases.label: capital_rebalance_qe_fang_monopoly
phases.macro: Dot-com bust, GFC, QE era, FANG platform monopoly, smartphone
phases.lesson: Platform monopoly + QE -> mega-cap dominance; Wirecard = extreme small-cap fat-tail fraud.

phases.label: everything_bubble_highrate_washout_genai
phases.macro: Infinite QE -> high-rate washout -> generative AI landing; concentration at 1930s extreme
phases.lesson: AI paradigm + extreme crowding -> Momentum Decoupling Lock (block reverse shorts on NVDA/SMCI-early); only hard cash-flow + physical moats are priced.
